description: You are a school counselor preparing an academic portfolio for an 11th-grade student, Brandon Lee (DOB: September 30, 2006), who is applying to college. In OpenSIS (Username: admin, Password: Admin@123), create four courses for the 11th grade: AP Statistics (STAT101, Math, 1.0 Credits), Creative Writing (WRIT101, English, 1.0 Credits), Civics (CIVIC101, Social Studies, 0.5 Credits), and Photography (PHOTO101, Arts, 0.5 Credits). For each course, record a 'Semester Final Grade' for Brandon Lee with the following scores: AP Statistics (85), Creative Writing (92), Civics (78), and Photography (96).
